stages.name: Structural fingerprint absent
stages.notes: Narrative Workflow macrostructure avoids centered-hero + 3-card default fingerprint

stages.name: Typography discipline
stages.notes: 2+1 rule: Sentient (display) + Switzer (body) + Geist Mono (outlier, ≤2 slots). All font-family declarations use var(--token). No system-ui as primary.

stages.name: Colour token discipline
stages.notes: All colors via var(--color-*) tokens. No inline oklch/hex. OKLCH palette with warm amber anchor hue 40. Accent oklch(72% 0.18 55). Bloom gradients on body. Dark paper 12% lightness.

stages.name: Spacing token discipline
stages.notes: All spacing via var(--space-*) 4pt scale. No magic numbers. Gate 24 fixed: .stage__sep-line class extracted, inline style removed.

stages.name: Layout and density
stages.notes: overflow-x: clip on html + body (gate 34). Asymmetric grid: 1fr / minmax(0, 220px). Page-gutter clamp. max-width 72rem. No equal-width 3-column layout.

stages.name: Motion and animation
stages.notes: Three named easings only. Three named durations only. prefers-reduced-motion collapses spatial motion to 150ms opacity crossfade.

stages.name: Enrichment and assets
stages.notes: Gate 38 fixed: Geist Mono limited to ≤2 slots (transcript__time + transcript__text). No stock images. No placeholder lorem ipsum. CSS art only (waveform, transcript, SVG thread, doc-preview).

stages.name: Accessibility and usability
stages.notes: Gate 39 fixed: min-height 44px on input + button. Gate 44 fixed: hook padding-block ratio 96px/64px = 1.5 ≥ 1.3. ARIA labels on all sections. aria-hidden on decorative visuals. focus-visible rings. Semantic HTML (nav, main, section, footer, h1, h2).

stages.name: Copy and voice
stages.notes: No filler phrases. No placeholder [BRAND] text. No lorem ipsum. Headline speaks to problem (lost ideas). Lede addresses audience directly. CTA copy specific (Start free →). No generic 'Revolutionize your workflow' language.

stages.name: Code hygiene
stages.notes: Relative CSS hrefs. Line-1 Hallmark stamp present in styles.css. Line-2 pre-emit critique scores present. No node_modules or dev artifacts in /results. Font preconnect links before stylesheet links.
